scheme_data.description: The PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi scheme provides an income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families. The scheme aims to supplement the financial needs of the farmers and help them improve their livelihoods.
scheme_data.benefit: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments
scheme_data.application_process: The state government and UT administration will identify the eligible farmer families as per the scheme guidelines. The fund will be directly transferred to the bank accounts of the beneficiaries.
